line: - The existing `saw status` implementation was close, but its human output included extra session text and its JSON payload did not expose the full `AgentState`.

items: The existing `saw status` implementation was close, but its human output included extra session text and its JSON payload did not expose the full `AgentState`.

line: - Reusing the shared snapshot path kept the one-shot status check fast; measured fixture execution was `6.09ms`.

items: Reusing the shared snapshot path kept the one-shot status check fast; measured fixture execution was `6.09ms`.

line: - Kept status on the direct snapshot path instead of adding a separate daemon transport, since current shared snapshot loading already satisfies the one-shot requirement.

items: Kept status on the direct snapshot path instead of adding a separate daemon transport, since current shared snapshot loading already satisfies the one-shot requirement.

line: - Made `--json` include top-level convenience fields plus a full cloned `state` object so scripts can use either stable summary keys or all raw `AgentState` fields.

items: Made `--json` include top-level convenience fields plus a full cloned `state` object so scripts can use either stable summary keys or all raw `AgentState` fields.

line: - `cargo test -p saw --bin saw` still emits pre-existing warnings: unused `Write` import in `src/cmd/watch.rs:15` and unused `find_session_jsonl` in `src/cmd/common.rs:300`.

items: `cargo test -p saw --bin saw` still emits pre-existing warnings: unused `Write` import in `src/cmd/watch.rs:15` and unused `find_session_jsonl` in `src/cmd/common.rs:300`.

line: - Human output for no-file cases remains `-`, e.g. `☠ DEAD  - (5066s ago)  cpu: 0.0%`.

items: Human output for no-file cases remains `-`, e.g. `☠ DEAD  - (5066s ago)  cpu: 0.0%`.

line: - Human one-shot output now matches the requested concise format in `src/cmd/status.rs:45`.
- `--json` now returns summary fields plus full `AgentState` under `state` in `src/cmd/common.rs:53`.
- Snapshot collection now preserves `session_id` and `session_jsonl_path` even when reading directly from a file in `src/cmd/common.rs:157`.
- Exit code coverage was expanded by test in `src/cmd/common.rs:716`.
